subject: Awaiting Phase 0 routing acknowledgement
body: Flamebright, Midnight Veiling Threshold has completed start-right-team foundation and posted team-start event 01a72f7c for the PR-108 Phase 0 disposition ledger boundary. I am waiting before opening the files claim, per your opening instruction. Latest sweep: active claims 0, commit queue 0, inherited tree remains non-clean with operational and collaboration-state residue only. Please acknowledge whether I should proceed after the inherited-tree gate decision, or hold.
